title_fr: Le gouvernement fédéral forme une minorité conservatrice
description_en: A Conservative minority government is formed federally — the upstream political context for this timeline. Events in this era are included to document the federal policy environment that preceded Alberta's provincial shift.

relations.framing_en: Documented opposition to omnibus legislation as Leader of the Opposition, followed by the use of omnibus bills (C-38 and C-45) containing hundreds of unrelated measures as Prime Minister.

verification_notes: Needs dedicated Elections Canada or CBC source for the election result.

update_log.change: Added R-103 (Elections Canada official 2006 results). Sourcing resolved.
